queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the impact of lacking a checking account on credit default probability and its contribution to increased credit risk.

queries.feature_definition: Savings account status: no known savings account.
queries.question: Statistical evaluation of the absence of a known savings account on credit default probability and its role in mitigating credit risk exposure.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Determinants of default analysis regarding checking account balances below zero on credit default probability and their association with decreased credit risk.
